aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Total Pro AC due to a lack of structured data, conversational content, and authority signals.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup to provide AI with structured business information.
Create an FAQ section with structured data to address common HVAC queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and reviews, but lacks Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No active management of Q&A section.
Opportunity to add more posts showcasing promotions or recent projects.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies due to potential third-party changes.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for explaining common HVAC tasks
No structured data for reviews or services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from understanding and citing their services.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'AC repair near me' or 'best HVAC services in Scottsdale'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQ schema to provide AI with the necessary information for citations.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts by publishing detailed content on industry trends, maintenance tips, and energy efficiency.

agency_pitch.hook: Boost AI-driven visibility with our AEO expertise.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AEO, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from AI users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks essential schema markup, making it difficult for AI to recognize and recommend their services.
agency_pitch.solution: We will implement comprehensive schema markup, develop conversational content, and enhance their GBP to ensure AI models cite them as a top HVAC provider.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, so acting now is crucial to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads: Your HVAC Business Deserves More Visibility
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI visibility and attract more customers.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital presence for AI-driven growth.
page_title: Total Pro A/C | Phoenix's Premier Air Conditioning Experts
